confirmationDrawer.summary: Deterministic action summary is rendered from buildExceptionBulkConfirmation and shown in the confirmation modal.
confirmationDrawer.validatedBy: test/frontend.wave1.spec.ts :: builds deterministic bulk confirmation summary for render state

rollbackHint.summary: Rollback hint is emitted for malformed/mixed-risk selections and rendered in panel + modal copy.

fallbackSafeReset.summary: Stale/no-selection fallback state includes explicit safe-reset guidance and disable-confirm behavior.
fallbackSafeReset.validatedBy: test/frontend.wave1.spec.ts :: returns explicit stale/no-selection fallback for safe reset UX
